description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in a modern, fitted jacket with a high collar and matching pants, both featuring sleek, athletic-inspired lines. The jacket has a zipper and a small emblem on the left chest, while the sleeves and pants are accented with vertical stripes. The figure's hands are relaxed at the sides, and the shoes are streamlined, suggesting a casual yet active style. The head is adorned with a voluminous, swept-back hairstyle, and the face is featureless, emphasizing the stylized nature of the figure. The overall appearance is that of a contemporary urban pedestrian, ready for city environments.
description: A stylized adult figure in a modern jacket and pants with athletic accents, relaxed posture, and swept-back hair. The look is casual and urban, suitable for city streets.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical stripes on the jacket and pants, and the profile of the swept-back hairstyle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the high-collared jacket, emblem, zipper, and symmetrical stance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stripes and profile details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, pants, and the full volume of the hairstyle.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic jacket with high collar and matching fitted pants
